name: caughtakwh
description: CaughtaKWH tracks Tesla Supercharger kWh pricing by station and recommends cheaper charging windows with 95% confidence intervals.

scripts.update:data: npm run discover && npm run scrape && npm run predict && npm run validate:data && npm run sync:public
scripts.improve:dashboard: node scripts/dashboard-bot.mjs && npm run sync:public && npm run validate:data
